author: Chris Oguntolu
description: Manage Git repositories with an intuitive UI: interactive commit graph, source control panel, and diff viewer. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.description: Manage Git repositories with an intuitive UI: interactive commit graph, source control panel, and diff viewer.
manifest.name: Git History

releases.description:
# 1.0.0 (2026-07-20)


### Features

* add professionalization tooling and strict TypeScript ([#4](https://github.com/chrisurf/obsidian-git-history/issues/4)) ([33ea0ae](https://github.com/chrisurf/obsidian-git-history/commit/33ea0aed66143120b561085200ed76d6c1b7a670))
* avatar circles, commit tooltips, changes bar & bug fixes ([#2](https://github.com/chrisurf/obsidian-git-history/issues/2)) ([b780ffd](https://github.com/chrisurf/obsidian-git-history/commit/b780ffdb89389e9d7b993f3ebac8313a208c5956))
* GitLens-style Source Control UI rewrite ([#1](https://github.com/chrisurf/obsidian-git-history/issues/1)) ([f2cd583](https://github.com/chrisurf/obsidian-git-history/commit/f2cd5832a652d948d855d8062ac03eeb0cf20ec9)), closes [#e8ab53](https://github.com/chrisurf/obsidian-git-history/issues/e8ab53)
* initial MVP of Git Studio for Obsidian ([e15a4c3](https://github.com/chrisurf/obsidian-git-history/commit/e15a4c3f3fa33da91b422cc450fddfc6ca18068d))
